about.title: About Alpha Strategy Group
about.subtitle: More than an agency. A global growth ecosystem.
about.body: Alpha Strategy Group is an international consulting firm headquartered in Miami, with presence across Latin America, the United States, and Europe. We specialize in business strategy, digital marketing, and professional development — integrating three strategic dimensions to drive real, measurable growth.
